mapper.select: SELECT KCY_QUESTION_ID AS kcyQuestionId, QUESTION_TEXT AS questionText, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder FROM KCY_QUESTION WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER, KCY_QUESTION_ID

SELECT NVL(SUM(ACTION_SCORE), 0) AS actionScore, NVL(SUM(OUTLINE_SCORE), 0) AS outlineScore, NVL(SUM(WIDE_SCORE), 0) AS wideScore, NVL(SUM(DEEP_SCORE), 0) AS deepScore, NVL(SUM(INDEPENDENT_SCORE), 0) AS independentScore, NVL(SUM(CORPORATE_SCORE), 0) AS corporateScore, NVL(SUM(PROMPTER_SCORE), 0) AS prompterScore, NVL(SUM(MANUAL_SCORE), 0) AS manualScore FROM KCY_OPTION WHERE KCY_OPTION_ID IN
#{optionId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT KCY_QUESTION_ID) FROM KCY_OPTION WHERE KCY_OPTION_ID IN
#{optionId}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET KCY_RESULT = #{kcyResult}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
